use_cases: Labels form input fields for accessibility and context
Provides accessible labeling for Radix UI primitive components
Styled label wrapper with disabled state handling
Accessible form field labeling with peer-disabled styling
ai_summary: A minimalist form label primitive component built on Radix UI's Label primitive with Tailwind CSS styling. Supports variant props for customization and maintains accessibility features including disabled state styling and peer-based disabled cursor/opacity behavior.
